requirement_source: PRD: orvex-wiki-api (slug 8jAiCBifDW, draft — includes DRAFT amendments FR-A24, NFR-A1a, NFR-A1b, NFR-A2a) + Architecture: orvex-wiki-api (slug pG9s9OjqZA, canonical + unratified Review-tightening addendum A1-A6/B1-B5/C-E)

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki-api: Phase-0 dual-surface strangler facade & Go runtime foundation

stories.title: [wiki-api] Go service skeleton, six-tier layout, config (CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME/upstreams) + /healthz
[wiki-api] Byte-compatible /api/orvex/* reverse proxy (surface a)
[wiki-api] Draft /v1 verb-grammar surface scaffold served alongside (surface b)
[wiki-api] Edge token verify via lib/auth + token pass-through + K4 interim posture
[wiki-api] No-authorization-decision propagation (401/403/404 verbatim, no existence oracles)
[wiki-api] Blocking CI bootstrap gates: test/gofmt/lint + no-AGPL-import guard + parity job
[wiki-api] pkg/dfm DfM->ProseMirror-JSON conversion (clean-room, from schema+catalog)
[wiki-api] pkg/dfm ProseMirror->DfM reverse conversion vs shipped read-path renderer
[wiki-api] Opaque-node typed handles + byte-identical reattach from ifVersion base
[wiki-api] In-process embedding + /v1/convert/* + fidelity-check endpoints
[wiki-api] Golden-corpus CI parity gate (Go round-trip vs engine catalog + fixtures)

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki-api: Verb grammar, read ladder & knowledge search fronting

stories.title: [wiki-api] Verb dispatch search/get/save/edit/list over {resource_type,locator} (no ask verb)
[wiki-api] Locator resolution composing engine resolvers (url/slug/title/NL)
[wiki-api] Read ladder info->outline(token_estimate)->blocks/:id?format=dfm + ranged reads
[wiki-api] Structural nav: space tree, backlinks, breadcrumbs
[wiki-api] search/related/duplicates knowledge fronting + typed-error degradation

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki-api: Block-patch write chokepoint, CAS, human-gating & quota

stories.title: [wiki-api] DfM->apply-ops translation + anchor/heading resolution, single atomic apply-ops call
[wiki-api] CAS ifVersion->409 VERSION_MISMATCH + verified read-after-write receipt (incl block-authoring)
[wiki-api] Human-gated transport: needs_human_*, RATIFY/CONFIRM verbatim + Studio deep-link
[wiki-api] ai-origin write path through standard chokepoint (delegated token, no privilege)
[wiki-api] QUOTA_EXCEEDED 402 verbatim propagation, batch fails whole, upgrade deep-link
[wiki-api] Generic orvex_dashboard milestone-scoped dashboard-graph block (no linear_*)

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki-api: Response shaping layer & the contracts-authored descriptor

stories.title: [wiki-api] One shaping layer: field projection, concise|detailed, cursor pagination
[wiki-api] Body-offload: resource_link handles + token estimates, ACL-enforced deref
[wiki-api] Contracts-authored descriptor conformance + served /v1/openapi.json drift-gate + fail-loud

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki-api: Doc-governance re-home — drift verify, spec-gate & audit-write (D-S8)

stories.title: [wiki-api] Living-wiki drift verification (verifyPage/getDrift/force-new-token) + real drift metric
[wiki-api] Wiki-first spec-gate {satisfied,token,reason} + confirm/ratify transport, de-Linearized
[wiki-api] External-agent audit-write endpoint -> engine WORM sink

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki-api: Operations — cache eviction, observability, health, latency & degradation

stories.title: [wiki-api] Event-evicted Redis artifact cache + evict consumer + cell-fail-closed guard
[wiki-api] Observability: OTel traces + Prometheus metrics + per-verb & facade-overhead SLIs
[wiki-api] Health vs liveness split + dependency round-trip health surface + CLUSTER_NAME echo
[wiki-api] Latency budgets & benchmarks (facade/bulk/warm-cache/rebuild) + non-SSE upstream deadline
[wiki-api] Redaction-below-relocation-line parity test + standalone degradation posture
